_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the MD source; CI regenerates this file.

parts.name: Container
parts.description: the bounding surface — typically a status region or live region

parts.name: Status icon
parts.description: glyph + color reinforcing severity (info, success, warning, error)

parts.name: Message
parts.description: the body content explaining what happened and (if applicable) what to do

parts.name: Action (optional)
parts.description: primary action — retry, undo, dismiss, view details

parts.name: Dismiss control (optional)
parts.description: explicit close affordance for transient feedback

patternRefs.note: transient feedback follows the toast enter/exit timing curve
loader-with-logo + loading-skeleton inherit the skeleton pulse cadence
severity transitions (e.g. error → success) cross-fade rather than swap

requirementRefs.note: error severity must be conveyed by text + icon, not color alone
transient messages use role=status (polite) or role=alert (assertive) per severity
respect prefers-reduced-motion — disable entrance pulse + slide
focus must not be stolen by toasts; persistent alerts may receive focus when actionable
